label: 区域轮廓
description: 从输入区域中向内提取 thickness 层边缘格作为轮廓拓扑。第一层用 8-邻接找最外圈非零边界格；之后每层用 4-邻接向内扩一格。
description-en: Extracts an inward outline of given thickness from a 0/1 region. The first layer uses 8-connectivity to find the outermost border cells; subsequent layers expand inward using 4-connectivity.
icon: 深色背景上一个填充矩形被一层细线轮廓包围，扁平插画风格，简洁小图标，主色2种。

outputs.name: topology
outputs.label: 轮廓拓扑
outputs.description: 0/1 拓扑 grid，包含从输入区域边缘向内 thickness 层的格。
outputs.description-en: 0/1 topology grid containing the inward outline of given thickness.
